executiveAssessment:
Acme Corp is a healthy mid-market account with strong product adoption and an engaged champion in Sarah Chen.

The primary risk is a competitor evaluation with Competitor X, driven by the incoming CTO who has prior relationships there. This requires immediate attention from the account team.

The biggest opportunity is the Q3 EMEA expansion, which could double seat count and increase ARR by 40%. Sarah has already secured internal buy-in from the EMEA director.

Key unknown: the new CTO's technology strategy and whether our roadmap aligns with their vision.
pullQuote: Competitor evaluation underway — but EMEA expansion could double the account if we move fast.

risks.text: Active competitor evaluation with Competitor X, driven by new CTO David Park who has prior relationship
Budget review in Q2 could reduce discretionary spend by 20%
APAC team adoption declining — only 30% utilization last month

stakeholderInsights.assessment: Primary champion. Highly engaged, drives adoption across teams.

stakeholderInsights.name: Lisa Wong
stakeholderInsights.assessment: Budget gatekeeper. Supportive but wants ROI data before approving expansion.

evidence: Strong VP contact, weak CTO relationship
